input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.2.1
            TITLE: conventionally designed bodywork or a nose cone is not considered an aerodynamic device

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.2.1: Conventionally designed Bodywork or a nose cone is not considered an Aerodynamic Device
T.7.2.1 Conventionally designed Bodywork or a nose cone is not considered an Aerodynamic Device

final_answer: Conventionally designed Bodywork or a nose cone is not considered an Aerodynamic Device
